reviews.review_description:
This game would have been a lot better if the developer wouldn't have gave up on this game. It's too hard to Sprint or run in the game. It would be a lot better if everyone could have a option in which you could run or Sprint without having to press hard on the remote.
 It would have been a real good game. 
It's just a waste of time and money. 
Don't waste your money.. SMH

If Into the Radius wasn’t a thing this game would be much better. It’s too similar to Into the Radius (another S.T.A.L.K.E.R.-ish game) for it’s good, ITR flaunts Kurgansk in most everything. If you want a game like this your going to buy ITR, Kurgansk needs more definition apart from being a downgrade. To distinguish it, in my opinion it’d be better to emphasize on a base-Building aspect similar to 7 days to die, where in you fortify with barbed wire and traps to protect you from night time enemies. An addition of a puzzle element would be neat to where players could find clues around the map to unlock things. It needs better user interface tho too.
Are you guys still working on this awesome game? I need more please!!😇😇🙏🙏👻👍
Don’t buy 2/10

Am disappointed. Game freezes often for a second even while a combat.  No clues on missing parts for crafting, where is anvil?  More often the quest items are not activated.  e.g. the button of the generator, i must trying many times to press the button.  Bugs in the doors, you have to try to go through them several times.  Firearms are very weak 2 magazines for a simple monster that's dead with 2-3 hits with a stick?  You go into an empty building, start crafting, suddenly appear a monster from behind...  Did the developers play their game themselves?

This is a great start yo what should be a great game the graphics are cell shaded wich I think will help it run better on the quest 2 and with some minor and major updates the game can be an epic one! Some updates that could be implemented are
1 smooth turning.
2 height adjuster.
3 improved tracking like picking up and putting away items.
4 more weapons
5 co-op!

lots of updates that add to the game over time is what will keep this one going. But for now this is worth the price and with updates will be worth more keep up the good work dev(s) 
(Edit) smooth turning has been added !

reviews.review_title: Great game, just needs a bit of work
reviews.review_description: So, firstly, some food items will be deleted when put in storage (baked apple and cooked meat i have discovered to have this issue so far), secondly, the dialogue doesn’t match the subtitles, makes no sense, and the subtitles being glued to my face makes me feel sick, thirdly, the world darkening for when you use smooth turning makes me feel sick as well, fourthly, anomalies camp outside my door, fifthly, (is fifthly even a word?)   tools fly out of my hands when i swing them once, and it’s hard to find them after they fly out of my hands, and that’s all the issues i have encountered, the game is still pretty good even with these issues UPDATE: storage is deleting EVERYTHING i put in, pls fix (review changed from 3 to 2 stars)

loving it the devs have and are doing a fantastic job keep it coming you guys are awesome no grips from me for the asking price it's great a group of developers that care about their game need more like you hope to see more games from this team with the quality they have put in this game i see great things from them in the future two great big thumbs up keep up the great work

I have one huge problem, and thats snap turn, which I’m going to assume will be a update very soon so we can have smooth motion, as every VR game needs it. 
       This game so far is handling great. I am really enjoying the world, looks great on Quest. I find a little delay in some movement. I’m really loving the comic book style as well. reminds me very much of Radiation City, but in VR. makes everything better. till my feet hurt.

reviews.review_title: This game was better then I expected
reviews.review_description: First off I can't believe this is in  applab it's better then so many games in the store it's a very fun survival story game the developer is updating the game and working on it this game is worth the money right now but I can't wait to see what the future has in store for this game 👍👍👍

developer_response.body: Thank you, we will try the best!

reviews.review_description: I had some gripes about this game at first but then the dev out of nowhere just fixed some of the main issues, so props for that. Bumping up to five stars. This small team delivered a game that has me surprisingly putting in more hours than some of the bigger, more expensive titles here. I cant stop going back to Kurgansk for some reason. It haunts me. I may be going insane.
Good game!

reviews.review_title: Doorways are a lil glitchy Das it so far
reviews.review_description: Definitely fun, gives me such a good spooky vibe! I hope they add more stuff!

developer_response.body: If you see glitches with collision - try to reset the center. Otherwise we will try to keep improving.

reviews.review_title: For a quest game on applab, it's not bad
reviews.review_description:
Not bad, but not great. Many good ideas, reminds me of the PCvr game into the radius but done significantly worse.

I'm a huge fan of open world survival games with or without crafting, but this one falls flat to me. Over all this is the type of game I want more of in VR, but this one isn't for me.

I hope many people buy it and the dev makes improvements, but for now I'm getting a refund. Maybe I'll return to kurgansk in the future if the game gets better.

Yes, this game has weird graphics. Yes, the enemies in this game are stupid and unintimidating. Yes, the interaction with the world is implemented at a basic level. Yes, there are bugs (not as many as you can read in other reviews). BUT! It's a good interesting game with a fascinating atmosphere. It only costs $10 and is much better than games that cost much more. Give it a chance.
This has got to be one of the best quest 2 games I have ever played tho the black enemies that 2 shot you and the finicky inventory are a bit annoying but aside from that it’s a great game

c'mon devs you can do better. this game got great potential .but it has to many bugs and i am playing on the quest 2 and to be honest.this games needs updating bug fixing and more physics .for now ....3 stars

reviews.review_title: Awesome cant wait to see where this gos
reviews.review_description:
This games atmosphere is a little unnerving and creepy and I love it.

 Does need smooth turning,  pathfinder for birds lol, NPC'S seem to hit from a good distance away. (probably more bugs I haven't noticed yet this is on app lab after all) buuuut I can see where this is going and cant wait for it 
 
Good job and good luck dev team

Amazing game, great story, pretty darn good graphics, and pretty good functionality. The story is written comic book style, it reminds me of lies beneath tbh. The graphics look solid for a semi open world game, when that 2nd stone statue appeared behind me while cooking, i jumped to the moon. The vr functionality is as good as walking dead saints and sinners in my opinion, not physics wise tho. With those things over with, here are the gripes i have with this game

#1:When you die you dont start back at your home, you start at the beginning, it isnt a large trek on the way back but it gets annoying. #2: How do i save, does it happen when you beat a quest? does it save when you exit the game? do i just have to go back to the home area in order to save?

developer_response.body:
Thank you! Answering your questions:
First #2: Saves are automatic once a minute. But there are no saves in dungeons - so you need to exit it in order for save to take place. 
#1 We are working on it.

reviews.review_title: So far it's pretty darn cool boi
reviews.review_description: Definitely give it a shot it's got a lot of saints and sinners similarities but holds its own tone at the same time! Could uses some more settings for sure such as smoothing turning instead of snap, still trying it out myself but can't wait to find out what happens!
